name: Arizer Air Belt-Clip Carry Case
summary: Arizer Air Belt-Clip Carry Case — a carry case for carrying your kit safely.
description: Effortlessly transport your Arizer Air Max or Air SE, along with the mouthpiece, spare battery, and strainer, using the convenient belt pouch included. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
